import re
import unicodedata
def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not s:
        return ''
    # unify hamza forms: alif with hamza above/below/madda -> alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # waw with hamza -> waw
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و')
    # yaa with hamza -> yaa
    s = s.replace('ئ','ي')
    # standalone hamza remove
    s = s.replace('ء','')
    # convert ta marbuta? We'll keep as ه? We'll leave as 'ه' to unify with some forms
    # But this may distort; for our case it probably doesn't matter.
    # s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse multiple spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

full_span = "وَإِنَّكَ لَتُحِنُّ إِلَى الَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا بِالْأَلْهِ الْخَاطِئِينَ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَشْقَى مِنَ الْأَحْزَابِ وَإِنَّ الْأَحْزَابَ لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ. وَإِنَّكَ لَتَنْبُوءُ بِالْأَحْزَابِ وَلَتَحْمِلُ الْكِتَابَ. وَإِ"
normalized_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
normalized_full

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

# Build list of (ratio, index, text, surah_id, ayah_id)
quran_scores = []
for rec in quran_data:
    text = rec['ayah_text']
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    ratio = sim_ratio(normalized_full, norm)
    quran_scores.append((ratio, rec['surah_id'], rec['ayah_id'], text, norm))

quran_scores.sort(reverse=True, key=lambda x: x[0])
quran_scores[:10]

target_phrase = normalize_arabic("الأحزاب لفي ضلال مبين")
candidates = []
for rec in quran_data:
    norm = normalize_arabic(rec['ayah_text'])
    if target_phrase in norm:
        candidates.append((rec['surah_id'], rec['ayah_id'], rec['ayah_text']))
candidates[:5], len(candidates)

# get verse 13:36
target_verse = [rec for rec in quran_data if rec['surah_id']==13 and rec['ayah_id']==36][0]
target_verse['ayah_text'], normalize_arabic(target_verse['ayah_text']), sim_ratio(normalized_full, normalize_arabic(target_verse['ayah_text']))

v = [rec for rec in quran_data if rec['surah_id']==42 and rec['ayah_id']==52][0]
v['ayah_text'], normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']), sim_ratio(normalized_full, normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']))

v = [rec for rec in quran_data if rec['surah_id']==2 and rec['ayah_id']==136][0]
v['ayah_text'], normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']), sim_ratio(normalized_full, normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']))
